mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED')) as "totalActiveOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_status IN ('CREATED', 'CONFIRMED')) as "pendingOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_status = 'SHIPPED') as "shippedOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_status = 'DELIVERED') as "deliveredOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_status = 'CANCELLED') as "cancelledOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.return_detail_flat WHERE return_status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'REJECTED', 'CANCELLED')) as "openReturns", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.support_ticket_flat WHERE ticket_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED')) as "openTickets", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE payment_status = 'FAILED') as "failedPayments", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.settlement_flat WHERE settlement_status = 'PENDING') as "pendingSettlements", (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND order_date::DATE = CURRENT_DATE) as "todayRevenue"

SELECT o.order_id as "orderId", o.order_number as "orderNumber", o.order_status as "orderState", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.total_items as "itemCount", o.order_date as "orderCreatedTime", o.last_modified_time as "orderModifiedTime", o.customer_id as "customerId", o.customer_first_name as "customerFirstName", o.customer_last_name as "customerLastName", o.customer_email as "customerEmail", o.customer_phone as "customerPhone", o.payment_id as "paymentId", o.payment_status as "paymentStatus", o.payment_method as "paymentMethod", o.total_amount as "paymentAmount", o.currency as "paymentCurrency", o.gateway_transaction_id as "gatewayTransactionId", o.payment_failure_reason as "paymentFailureReason", o.order_date as "paymentTime", o.shipment_id as "shipmentId", o.shipping_status as "shippingStatus", o.carrier as "carrier", o.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", o.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", o.estimated_delivery as "estimatedDeliveryDate", o.actual_delivery as "actualDeliveryDate", '' as "currentLocation", 0 as "deliveryAttempts", ff.fulfillment_id as "fulfillmentId", ff.fulfillment_status as "fulfillmentStatus", ff.warehouse_id as "warehouseId", ff.priority as "fulfillmentPriority", ff.assigned_picker_id as "assignedPicker", ff.assigned_packer_id as "assignedPacker" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o LEFT JOIN hm_query.fulfillment_flat ff ON ff.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT oa.activity_id as "activityId", oa.order_id as "orderId", oa.activity_name as "activityName", oa.activity_comment as "comment", oa.activity_success as "success", oa.created_by as "performedBy", oa.created_time as "activityTime" FROM hm_query.order_activity_flat oa WHERE oa.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oa.created_time ASC
